primerTitle: Banking data handling — how to use it
primer:
## Banking data handling
The working data toolchain of a quant/risk role, **one deck per language** — concept-first cards (with worked code) followed by quick which-function recall checks.
- **Python for data (pandas)** — DataFrames, joins, groupby, missing data, NumPy, scikit-learn, statsmodels.
- **R for data (base · dplyr · DBI)** — vectors, data.frames, factors, dplyr verbs, lm/glm, the apply family.
- **SAS for data (DATA step · PROC SQL)** — the DATA step, LIBNAME, PROC IMPORT/MEANS/FREQ/REG/LOGISTIC, PROC SQL, MERGE BY.

Learn the concept, then drill instant recall of the exact function — the same verbs (read, query, join, filter, group, map) in three dialects.
